text.title: Funnel Optimization Checklist by Phase
text.summary: Per-phase verification steps ensuring measurement quality, diagnosis depth, and test rigor before moving to the next phase.

list.item: Define all steps from entry to goal
Identify main funnel type (marketing, SaaS, e-commerce, mobile)
Name each step with an analytics event name
Identify entry point and conversion goal
Document alternate paths or user segments
Get stakeholder agreement on funnel definition
Set up event tracking for all steps
Collect minimum 30 days of historical data
Calculate conversion rate: (users at step N / users at step 1) x 100
Calculate drop rate: ((users at N - users at N+1) / users at N) x 100
Segment by: traffic source, device, new vs. returning
Verify data quality — no tracking errors, complete events
Rank each step transition by absolute users lost
Calculate percentage of total users lost per transition
Identify top 3 transitions by absolute loss
Confirm which drop has the largest financial impact
Review session recordings for the priority drop-off step
Check heatmaps (click and scroll behavior)
Run exit-intent survey at drop-off point
Conduct 5-10 user interviews for major product issues
Check technical error logs at that step
Compare mobile vs. desktop behavior
Measure page load speed at that step
Document all findings before generating hypotheses
Create 5-10 IF/THEN/BECAUSE statements
Each hypothesis grounded in Phase 4 diagnosis
Each hypothesis is testable (has a measurable metric)
Cover design, copy, and flow changes
Score each hypothesis with ICE (Impact, Confidence, Ease)
Rank hypotheses by ICE score; test highest first
Define control and variant clearly — change only one variable
Set test duration until statistical significance (p < 0.05)
Track primary metric plus secondary metrics
Monitor test daily for anomalies
Document winner and loser with statistical confidence
Implement winning test if lift exceeds threshold
Document learnings and surprising findings
Move to next hypothesis or next biggest drop
Set up weekly/monthly funnel review cadence
Track cumulative improvement over time

text.reference: Funnel analysis document template for recording step metrics and hypotheses
